channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: Trump’s Alaska Oil, Gas Lease Auction Draws Just Two Bidders
item.description: Only two bidders participated in the Trump administration’s auction for drilling leases in Alaska’s Arctic National Wildlife Refuge as big oil companies sat out the sale.
item.dc:creator: Ruth Liao

item.title: US Says Antares’ Small Nuclear Reactor Reaches ‘Criticality’
item.description: The Trump administration announced a small modular nuclear reactor reached a critical milestone Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ari Natter, Will Wade

item.title: Biodiversity Decline Threatens Sovereign Credit Ratings, Study Says
item.description: A new academic study finds that a partial ecological collapse would be enough to increase the borrowing costs of almost two dozen countries.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Raimonde

item.title: India Power Giant May Revive Small Coal Plants to Aid Solar
item.description: India’s largest power producer NTPC Ltd. is looking to bring back sub-critical coal generators able to run at low capacity, to accommodate more renewables in the grid.
item.dc:creator: Rajesh Kumar Singh

item.title: India Unveils Ethanol-Rich Fuel as It Seeks to Reduce Oil Imports
item.description: India has launched a new high-ethanol fuel blend in the market, its latest effort to diversify supplies and reduce the country’s reliance on imported oil.
item.dc:creator: Rakesh Sharma, Alisha Sachdev

item.title: How Extreme Heat Will Factor Into World Cup Games
item.description: Some teams will face a much hotter path to the finals.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Chen, Emma Court, Elena Mejia, David Ingold, Joe Wertz, Eric Roston

item.title: US Public Transit Bounces Back as War-Fueled Gas Prices Remain High
item.description: From LA to Boston, bus and train ridership is growing. But experts say it’s still difficult to get most drivers out of their cars.
item.dc:creator: Todd Woody

item.title: Chinese Solar Firms Look Beyond Earth for Growth
item.description: Years of crippling oversupply are forcing the industry to explore new markets.
item.dc:creator: Autor não encontrado

item.title: Asia’s ‘Ukraine Moment’ Is Supercharging the Energy Transition
item.description: From the Philippines to France, policymakers see electrification and renewables as the key to energy security and stable prices.
item.dc:creator: Akshat Rathi, Peter Guest, Oscar Boyd

item.title: Trump’s Arctic Refuge Auction to Test Oil Industry’s Appetite
item.description: President Donald Trump vowed to reopen Alaska’s Arctic National Wildlife Refuge to oil drilling as he seeks to make tapping the state’s vast natural resources a key part of his energy agenda.
item.dc:creator: Ari Natter
